REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JOANNA CHEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT BIFURCATES CAUSES OF ACTION 4, 5, AND 6 (REGARDING THE SAN MATEO COUNTY PROPERTY) FROM THE COMPLAINT, AND ORDERS IT TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY. THE COURT DOES NOT RULE ON THIS DEMURRER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: PEGGY TSUJIMOTO, CSR 5229, EMAIL: P2GMOTO@EARTHLINK.NET / TEL: 415.828.1919)
